paramInformation.label: Quick Start Time
paramInformation.description: Duration of initial increased power output when light turns on.

paramInformation.label: Quick Start Level
paramInformation.description: Level of initial increased power output when light turns on.

paramInformation.label: Increase Output Power (Non-Neutral)
paramInformation.description: Increase output power when in non-neutral mode. (May cause problems with high level flicker or aux switch detection. Adjust maximum level if you are having problems.)

options.label: No delay (Config button still has 500 ms delay)
Exclusion disabled (Must factory reset to exclude, or change this parameter)

paramInformation.label: Send Local Commands to Associated Devices
Forward Z-Wave Commands to Associated Devices
Default All LED Strip Color When On
Default All LED Strip Color When Off
Default All LED Strip Brightness When On
Default All LED Strip Brightness When Off
After Hours Time Range Start Hour
paramInformation.description: The UTC hour where After Hours mode should start

paramInformation.label: After Hours Time Range Start Minute
paramInformation.description: The minute where After Hours mode should start

paramInformation.label: After Hours Time Range End Hour
paramInformation.description: The UTC hour where After Hours mode should end

paramInformation.label: After Hours Time Range End Minute
paramInformation.description: The minute where After Hours mode should end

options.label: Disabled. Light does not turn on or off with presence
Auto on/off when occupied: Light is on when room is occupied, off when unoccupied
Auto off when vacant: Light turns off when room becomes vacant, never automatically turns on
Auto on when occupied: Light turns on when room becomes occupied, never automatically turns off
Auto on/off when vacant: Light is on when room is vacant, off when occupied
Auto on when vacant: Light turns on when room becomes vacant, never automatically turns off
Auto off when occupied: Light turns off when room becomes occupied, never automatically turns on
Restore the mmwave module factory configuration
The interference area is automatically generated
Obtains the interference region and detection region

paramInformation.label: mmWave Detection Timeout
paramInformation.description: Amount of time in seconds after presence detection that a no-presence report is sent.

paramInformation.label: mmWave Person in the Reporting Area 1 (Read Only)
mmWave Person in the Reporting Area 2 (Read Only)
mmWave Person in the Reporting Area 3 (Read Only)
mmWave Person in the Reporting Area (Read Only)
Room Size
paramInformation.description: Sets the x, y, and z dimensions of the room for mmWave detection. Changing this parameter will update parameters 101-106 to reflect the preset.

paramInformation.label: Single-Tap Behavior
paramInformation.description: What happens when the switch is single-tapped

options.label: Up - Increment level up (Off > low > medium > high), down - Increment level down (High > medium > low > off)
Up - Increment level up (Off > low > medium > high > low > ...), down - Off

paramInformation.label: Aux Switch Scenes
paramInformation.description: Send different scene numbers when the Aux switch is clicked

paramInformation.description: Low level to use when group 7 cycles levels

paramInformation.description: Medium level to use when group 7 cycles levels

paramInformation.description: High level to use when group 7 cycles levels
Color to use for the LED bar while briefly indicating group 7 command transmission
paramInformation.label: Group 7: LED Color
LED Bar in On/Off Mode
paramInformation.description: When the device is in On/off mode, use full LED bar or just one LED

metadata.reset: Simultaneously hold the config button and the up button until the LED bar turns red.  Release the buttons and the switch will reset to factory defaults.
